task_completion.description: Navigate to the jurisdiction configuration or LEPC settings area in CAMEO Data Manager.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CAMEO Data Manager application is open, and the screen displays the Jurisdiction, LEPC, or Facility configuration form.

task_completion.description: Enter the LEPC Name, State, and County.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Cuyahoga County Local Emergency Planning Committee' is visible in the LEPC Name field, 'OH' in the State field, and 'Cuyahoga' in the County field.

task_completion.description: Enter the Address, City, and Zip code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '323 Lakeside Avenue West' is visible in the Address field, 'Cleveland' in the City field, and '44113' in the Zip code field.
The text '(216) 443-5700' is visible in the Phone number input field.

task_completion.description: Enter the LEPC Chairperson and Fire District/Jurisdiction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Emergency Management Director' is visible in the LEPC Chairperson field, and 'Cuyahoga County Emergency Services' is visible in the Fire District/Jurisdiction field.

task_completion.description: Save the entered jurisdiction details in the database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visual indication that the record has been saved, such as clicking a 'Save' or 'Add' button, a confirmation dialog, or the newly created record appearing in a list/database view.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the CAMEO Data Manager graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual CAMEO Data Manager application window being used, rather than a terminal, script, or database command line interface.

integrity.description: The agent entered the data into the correct application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required details are typed into the specific form fields of the CAMEO Data Manager software, not just written in a text editor like Notepad or a web browser.

integrity.description: The agent did not manipulate the UI using developer tools or mock interfaces.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface appears standard for CAMEO Data Manager without any visible developer consoles, HTML editing tools, or unnatural UI artifacts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: The LEPC name is 'Cuyahoga County Local Emergency Planning Committee', the state is 'OH', and the city is 'Cleveland'. Note: The agent MUST input the specific values provided in the task description (e.g., Address: 323 Lakeside Avenue West, Phone: (216) 443-5700), even if real-world values differ.
